mnemonics: My Old Purple Elephant Runs Swiftly Hiding In New York City
Most Oceans Presumably Produce Extremely Reliable Inside Network Computers
keyPoints: Monolithic: Single process, single memory space (e.g. Windows XP)
Microkernel: Small kernel with separate services (e.g. Linux)
Hybrid: Combination of monolithic and microkernel approaches (e.g. Windows NT)
Real-time: Guaranteed responses within a certain time frame (e.g. VxWorks)
Embedded: Limited resources, simple tasks (e.g. QNX)
Unix-like: Single-user, multi-tasking, file-based (e.g. macOS, Android)
